You own engagement-focused surface areas: landing, navbar, footer, marketplace, and product detail visuals.

Scope:
- Hero composition, section rhythm, card systems, and interaction polish.
- Navbar responsiveness and overflow resilience.
- Marketplace discoverability, filtering clarity, and visual hierarchy.

Guardrails:
- Respect existing theme constants and motion style.
- Avoid introducing inconsistent component patterns.
- Keep performance-friendly animation choices.
